_comment: Active hooks config in warn mode. Preferred command patterns: validate before commit, review before push, test before mark done.

_setup_notes.activation: Move or symlink this file to ~/.vs-agents/hooks/hooks.json to activate. Example: ln -sfn hooks.local.json hooks.json
_setup_notes.mode: warn - allows operations with warnings, does not block (unlike enforce mode in gates)
_setup_notes.script_paths: Pre/post-tool-use scripts reference gate-aligned validation patterns and log decisions to hook.log
